post.title: Your Company is One Resignation Away from AI Disaster
post.description: AI pioneers can transform your operations, but they also represent a significant vulnerability if their knowledge remains undocumented and unshared.
post.excerpt: Imagine halving your programme development time with AI. One corporate training company I spoke to did exactly that. But their impressive…
